heading: Tutorials
body:
For more tutorials on building AI agents with MongoDB,
refer to the following table:

| Frameworks           | Build an AI Agent with LangGraph and MongoDB AtlasBuild an AI Agent with LangGraph.js and MongoDB AtlasNatural Language to MQL Agent with LangChain and LangGraphBuild an Agentic RAG Application with CrewAI and MongoDBIntegrate MongoDB with MastraOther AI framework integrations |
| -------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Enterprise platforms | Get Started with the Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Base IntegrationBuild AI Agents with Vertex AI Agent Engine and AtlasAzure AI Foundry                                                                                                                                                   |
| Tools                | Build an AI Agent with MongoDB and n8n                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| Additional resources | Docs Notebooks RepositoryGenAI Showcase Repository                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
